headline: 3 Consumer Stocks with Open Questions
summary: Consumer discretionary businesses are levered to the highs and lows of economic cycles. Over the past six months, it seems like demand may be facing some headwinds as the industry’s 3.4% return has lagged the S&P 500 by 6.9 percentage points.

headline: Uncover the latest developments among S&P500 stocks in today's session.
